$schema_note: Ground-truth key for the A/B benchmark's first committed run (fg-a10402, benchmark T2; design docs/plans/2026-07-18-ab-benchmark-design.md D2/D3/D5). Maps each of the 8 min-viable task_ids (human's 2026-07-18 binding answer: 8 pairs, 2 per class) to its brief path, its frozen checklist path + content hash, and the planted-defect id(s) (from tools/benchmark/ground-truth/ledgerkit-defects.sealed.json) it targets, if any. Consumed by whoever builds/drives the T7 blinded-audit harness and by T8's run inventory -- like tools/benchmark/ground-truth/ledgerkit-defects.sealed.json and bench/keys/*.sealed.json (per blinding.py SEALED_KEY_DIR), this file identifies which defect a task targets and must NOT be handed to the blinded auditor spawn (D5: the auditor receives only the frozen checklist, the normalized labeled diffs, and the fixture base -- never this key, never the raw ledgerkit-defects.sealed.json). It is fine for the checklists themselves to reference defect ids (D5 explicitly allows a checklist to be 'a pure correctness spec... expected behaviors, edge cases, planted defects'); what must stay sealed from the auditor is which arm's diff is which and this file's task->defect index used to build/validate that scoring, not the mere existence of defect ids inside a checklist.
run_scope: first committed run: 8 tasks, 2 per class (human's 2026-07-18 binding answer to design open question 1)

class_taxonomy.bug-fix: design §3 'Bug fix (planted defect, known root cause; regression test required)'

not_built_this_run.note: Design §3 names 12 tasks (3/class); the human's binding answer scoped the first run to 8 (2/class). These 4 are not built in this run -- listed here only so a future extension to 3/class (design §D2) knows what's left, not as part of the 8-pair inventory below.
not_built_this_run.M3: click major-version bump -- skipped: no real click 9 exists to install against, so the task as designed cannot pass a real dependency-install gate in this environment.
not_built_this_run.F3: --currency flag with a fixed conversion table -- skipped for the 8-task minimum; no currency table exists anywhere in ledgerkit today, larger invented-scope risk than M1/M2/F1/F2.
not_built_this_run.B2: date-range --since/--until boundary bug (ledgerkit-defects.sealed.json D-002) -- skipped for the 8-task minimum; B1 and B3 were chosen as the two most behaviorally distinct bug classes (silent-drift-turned-crash vs. hard crash).
not_built_this_run.DOC3: CHANGELOG entry + 'Rounding semantics' doc section describing post-B1 behavior -- skipped: this task assumes B1's fix has already landed in the same tree, which doesn't hold for an independent single-task arm-run starting from the shared pinned base; would need re-scoping before it can be a standalone pair.
